title: lithocarpus platyphyllus
intro: Lithocarpus platyphyllus, also known as the Taiwan nut tree, is a species of deciduous tree belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus platyphyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Lithocarpus platyphyllus can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
